signals: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.5 y GPT-5.5 Pro elevando el techo de inteligencia y eficiencia en su API.
NVIDIA presenta Rubin y vaticina una reconfiguración económica de la computación de 10 billones de dólares.
Google despliega la serie Gemini 3.1 optimizada para latencia, coste y control granular de voz (TTS).
Decoupled DiLoCo permite entrenamiento de modelos masivos en infraestructuras distribuidas y resilientes.
La contabilidad de carbono se consolida como requisito obligatorio de adquisición en la industria de chips.
risks: Mercados de agentes autónomos operando con marcos legales y políticas de seguridad insuficientes.
Dependencia crítica de la ejecución de nuevas fábricas de semiconductores frente a la retórica de inversión.
Cuellos de botella en la sostenibilidad ambiental debido a la escala energética demandada por el hardware.
watch: Rendimiento de GPT-5.5 Pro en entornos críticos de salud y precisión clínica.
Adopción de la arquitectura Rubin de NVIDIA frente a soluciones de silicio personalizadas.
Estandarización de métricas AGI a través del nuevo marco cognitivo de DeepMind.

items.title: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants di...
items.summary: Markets of AI agents could provide value, but there are plenty of rough edges. Access to higher-quality models conferred a real advantage—and participants didn’t notice. There are plenty of other ways they can go wrong. Policy and legal frameworks will need to adapt to keep up.
items.why: Récords de velocidad en entrenamiento demuestran la superioridad de los sistemas integrados frente a soluciones DIY.

items.title: Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training
items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite optimiza el equilibrio entre inteligencia y coste operativo para despliegues masivos.

items.title: TSMC Technology Symposium 2026 Overview
items.summary: Yes, it is that time of year again, the 2026 TSMC Technology Symposium kick-off event in Silicon Valley. TSMC has never been in a better position to forecast the future of semiconductor technology and the industry itself. items.why: La técnica Decoupled DiLoCo permite entrenar modelos en clústeres geográficamente dispersos con alta resiliencia.

items.summary: Update: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Quote OpenAI Developers @OpenAIDevs 20h GPT-5.5 is now available in the API. The model brings higher intelligence and stronger token efficiency to complex work, helping tasks get done with fewer retries. x.com/16338749515087… Today we’re introducing two big steps for health at OpenAI: - ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free version of ChatGPT designed for clinical work - HealthBench Professional, a new benchmark to evaluate real clinician chat tasks We’re excited about what this can unlock for care. ![Image 5: ❤️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/2764.svg)
items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS introduce etiquetas de audio granulares para un control preciso de la expresividad en voz sintética.

items.title: A defining moment in history. A clear mandate from the American people. 365 days later, President Donald J. Trump is delivering, patriotism is rising, Americ...
items.summary: A defining moment in history. A clear mandate from the American people. 365 days later, President Donald J. Trump is delivering, patriotism is rising, America is BACK, and the story is just getting started. ![Image 4: 🇺🇸](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f1fa-1f1f8.svg) Under ’s leadership, we’re putting power back where it belongs — with the American people ![Image 5: 🇺🇸](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f1fa-1f1f8.svg) At , this is another step in the reorganization and leadership restructuring we announced last year, grounded in President Trump’s vision to right-size government, return it YOUR story can help improve health care for other Veterans. items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live reduce drásticamente la latencia para interacciones de voz humanas más naturales.

items.title: As AI Grows More Complex, Model Builders Rely on NVIDIA
items.summary: Unveiling what it describes as the most capable model series yet for professional knowledge work, OpenAI launched GPT-5.2 in December. The model was trained and deployed on NVIDIA infrastructure, including NVIDIA Hopper and GB200 NVL72 systems. GPT-5.3 Codex — the first OpenAI agentic coding model to help build itself — was released in February and […]
items.why: Lanzamiento de GPT-5.5 Pro y versiones especializadas para medicina; marca el nuevo estado del arte en razonamiento y eficiencia.

items.title: Innovation to Impact: How NVIDIA Research Fuels Transformative Work in AI, Graphics and Beyond
items.summary: The roots of many of NVIDIA’s landmark innovations — the foundational technology that powers AI, accelerated computing, real-time ray tracing and seamlessly connected data centers — can be found in the company’s research organization, a global team of around 400 experts in fields including computer architecture, generative AI, graphics and robotics. Established in 2006 and […]
items.why: La plataforma Rubin de NVIDIA es el pilar de la próxima generación de hardware para la economía de IA de 10 billones.

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.why: Propuesta de un marco formal para medir el progreso hacia AGI, buscando estandarizar la evaluación de capacidades.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.
items.why: Integración de herramientas de IA directamente en el navegador simplifica la automatización de tareas diarias para el usuario.

items.title: NVIDIA Research Shapes Physical AI
items.summary: AI and graphics research breakthroughs in neural rendering, 3D generation and world simulation power robotics, autonomous vehicles and content creation.
items.why: Gemini Embedding 2 facilita búsquedas multimodales nativas y estables para aplicaciones de producción a gran escala.

items.title: Reaching Across the Isles: UK-LLM Brings AI to UK Languages With NVIDIA Nemotron
items.summary: Celtic languages — including Cornish, Irish, Scottish Gaelic and Welsh — are the U.K.’s oldest living languages. To empower their speakers, the UK-LLM sovereign AI initiative is building an AI model based on NVIDIA Nemotron that can reason in both English and Welsh, a language spoken by about 850,000 people in Wales today. Enabling high-quality […]
items.why: Investigación sobre mercados de agentes destaca la necesidad urgente de marcos legales para evitar fallos de alineación.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases New AI Models and Developer Tools to Advance Autonomous Vehicle Ecosystem
items.summary: Autonomous vehicle (AV) stacks are evolving from many distinct models to a unified, end-to-end architecture that executes driving actions directly from sensor data. This transition to using larger models is drastically increasing the demand for high-quality, physically based sensor data for training, testing and validation. To help accelerate the development of next-generation AV architectures, NVIDIA […]
items.why: La huella de carbono se convierte en un factor decisivo de compra y cumplimiento normativo para fabricantes de chips.

items.title: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. ![Image 5: 🕹️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f579.svg) His epiphany that...
items.summary: For , the path to AGI started in 1988 with an Amiga 500 and a game of Othello. ![Image 5: 🕹️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f579.svg) His epiphany that software could act on our behalf remains at the heart of our work today as we apply the same logic to solving scientific grand challenges. Read more on Gemini Embedding 2 is now generally available in the Gemini API and Vertex AI! Start building with our first natively multimodal embedding model, now equipped with the stability and optimizations required for production apps.
items.why: Adquisición de IPnest por SemiWiki consolida el análisis de propiedad intelectual en el sector de semiconductores.

items.title: Applications Now Open for $60,000 NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship Awards
items.summary: Bringing together the world’s brightest minds and the latest accelerated computing technology leads to powerful breakthroughs that help tackle some of the biggest research problems. To foster such innovation, the NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship Program provides grants, mentors and technical support to doctoral students doing outstanding research relevant to NVIDIA technologies. items.why: Análisis crítico sobre la necesidad de capital real en plantas de fabricación frente a la influencia mediática.

items.title: Isambard-AI, the UK’s Most Powerful AI Supercomputer, Goes Live
items.summary: The University of Bristol’s Isambard-AI, powered by NVIDIA Grace Hopper Superchips, delivers 21 exaflops of AI performance, making it the fastest system in the U.K. and among the most energy-efficient globally.
items.why: Iniciativa de Google y MIT para analizar el impacto de la IA en la productividad y la adaptación de la fuerza laboral.
